messages.author: cicero13106
messages.text: I have a repeater on little blacktail 4800’ high. It connects hayden area and Sandpoint together(and everything in between). I used to use meshtastic but I’ve switched everything to meshcore.
messages.content_html: I have a repeater on little blacktail 4800’ high. It connects hayden area and Sandpoint together(and everything in between). I used to use meshtastic but I’ve switched everything to meshcore.

messages.author: elasticdog
messages.text: Hey @cicero13106 , I just started adding some nodes south of Spokane. I assume you're running the Neo nodes on the map?
messages.content_html: Hey @cicero13106, I just started adding some nodes south of Spokane. I assume you're running the Neo nodes on the map?

messages.author: cicero13106
messages.text: no. I haven’t put any nodes on the map yet. I’ll do that today. You got a repeater or just some home nodes?
messages.content_html: no. I haven’t put any nodes on the map yet. I’ll do that today. You got a repeater or just some home nodes?

messages.author: elasticdog
messages.text: Have a Station G2 running as a room/repeater permanently mounted at the house, plus a muziWORKS R1 (RAK) and SenseCAP T1000-E that I've been tinkering with. I've got a few friends that have been starting with Meshtastic that I'd love to get migrated over to MeshCore, so hopefully more nodes popping up soon.
messages.content_html: Have a Station G2 running as a room/repeater permanently mounted at the house, plus a muziWORKS R1 (RAK) and SenseCAP T1000-E that I've been tinkering with. I've got a few friends that have been starting with Meshtastic that I'd love to get migrated over to MeshCore, so hopefully more nodes popping up soon.

messages.author: cicero13106
messages.text: That’s awesome! I’m up near athol Idaho. I put one of my nodes in the meshcore map. I’m going to put my repeater back up blacktail mt. soon. I also helped a lot of folks here start on meshtastic. I’m trying to get them to convert to meshcore. I’m going to be driving through Spokane tomorrow morning. I’ll try to ping you. I’m going to carrying strong a node I called gollum.
messages.content_html: That’s awesome! I’m up near athol Idaho. I put one of my nodes in the meshcore map. I’m going to put my repeater back up blacktail mt. soon. messages.author: elasticdog
messages.text: Sweet! I’m also working on a website for local MeshCore advocacy. Hope to have it up in the next week and then I planned on setting one my nodes on Meshtastic to have its long name be the URL.
messages.content_html: Sweet! I’m also working on a website for local MeshCore advocacy. Hope to have it up in the next week and then I planned on setting one my nodes on Meshtastic to have its long name be the URL.

messages.author: elasticdog
messages.text: I finished the advocacy site, complete with interactive mesh network simulator! Feedback welcome... https://www.spokanemesh.net/
messages.content_html: I finished the advocacy site, complete with interactive mesh network simulator! Feedback welcome... https://www.spokanemesh.net/
embeds_html:
Spokane Mesh Network - Every Node Counts
Text, track, & coordinate. Anywhere from the Palouse wheat fields to the Selkirk peaks. Join us in building a resilient, community-owned mesh network for the Inland Northwest.

messages.author: Apex
messages.text: Deploying a repeater to canfield in CDA tomorrow if all goes well. Will be using the current (non depreciated) settings. Hopefully that encourage activity

messages.text: Repeater "Mostly Harmless" deployed to canfield mountain. It will likely remain in place for this winter, my knees couldn't take me any higher.

messages.text: @Coyot21 you're welcome to hop in our discord at some point to chat & coordinate long term. https://IdahoMesh.org we've got folks from all over South, East and Central Idaho, but no representation from y'all up North. https://discord.gg/Bbf3u6qq

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: the meshcore dev team have moved to a new discord server. details and reasons are here: https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/23/the-split Please create a new thread for your region in the https://discord.com/channels/1495203904898728149/1495412453150818585 for your region on the new meshcore.io discord server. https://meshcore.gg
